items.summary: Update `backend/main.mo` `getHeartbeatData` so the `cycles` value no longer uses any unavailable cycles balance API: attempt to use `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` for the canister cycle balance; if `ExperimentalCycles.balance()` is not available in this Motoko version, set `cycles` to `0` and add the exact comment `// TODO: Replace with actual cycle balance API when available.`. Do not change any other logic, types, fields, access control, or behavior in `getHeartbeatData` beyond this `cycles` retrieval adjustment.
